productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Navy Blue Checked Shirt
description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has navy blue and khakhi bold checks with grey and black accents, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, appliqued brand tab on the left pocket, full length buttoned placket with tri-colour buttons and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  navy blue and khakhi check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The tri-toned buttons add to the sense of style. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
